name: Chest pain
purpose: Organize chest pain concerns with emergency escalation — never diagnose heart or lung cause.
not_allowed: Diagnosing heart attack, angina, or reflux as certainty
Prescribing nitrates or any cardiac drug
Advising to wait at home when emergency symptoms present

required_questions.prompt: Did pain start suddenly or gradually?
Any breathlessness, sweating, or pain spreading to arm or jaw?

allowed_actions.title: Seek emergency care
allowed_actions.instruction: Sudden or severe chest pain needs emergency evaluation — call local emergency services or go now.

allowed_actions.title: Note onset details
allowed_actions.instruction: If not in immediate danger, note time started and associated symptoms for clinicians.
